about.title: About Me
about.intro: I'm from Blumenau, SC — Brazil. I joined the tech industry in 2023 with no formal CS background, learning through practice, consistency, and a lot of curiosity.
about.paragraph2: What drives me is understanding systems end-to-end: not just making things work, but knowing why that decision and not another. That's what makes me actively take part in architecture discussions, not just execute tasks.
about.paragraph3: Outside of work I'm always studying something I haven't mastered yet — distributed systems, high scalability and software architecture. I believe the best way to grow as an engineer is to expose yourself to problems bigger than the ones you solve today.
about.value1: I deliver sustainable code, not just code that works
about.value2: I take part in technical decisions with reasoning, not just execution
about.value3: I learn proactively — what I don't know today, I master before I need it
